title: Threat Intelligence & Reconnaissance
overview: Your first module at NEXUS establishes your security workstation and teaches reconnaissance methodology. You'll learn what attackers can discover about an organization without ever touching their systems—then apply those skills to a real client assessment.

weeks_breakdown.labDesc: Build your security workstation. Install VirtualBox, Kali Linux, verify tools.
Master Nmap, Netcat, OSINT tools. Practice on training targets.
Client engagement. External reconnaissance assessment + professional report.

clientContext.label: Client Context: Brazos Financial Group
clientContext.body: Ray Jimenez (CTO) wants to understand what an attacker could discover about Brazos without insider access. The SEC examination is in 6 months—he needs ammunition for his security budget presentation to the board.

footer: Start with Lab 1.1 in the Assignments section.
